mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace reads the CmpLogObserver buffer for FOURCC class-tag comparisons and splices the exact 'spac'/'prtr' constants at input offset 0x0c, reaching the XYZ->Lab conversion arm that value_profile's Hamming gradient cannot assemble.
one_line: I2S splices exact device-class FOURCC 'spac'/'prtr' to reach XYZ-to-Lab arm

mechanism_summary: VP's CMP_MAP gradient gives distance credit for each colorspace/PCS sub-field comparison that approaches the XYZ-input/Lab-output discriminant, letting vpc_cmplog accumulate partial-match stepping-stones across multiple header fields that bare cmplog discards.
one_line: VP gradient accumulates multi-field colorspace partial matches toward XYZ-Lab arm

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace logs the device-class FOURCC literals compared in the dispatch and substitutes 'spac'/'prtr' at offset 0x0c, routing the profile into the devicelink/abstract branch where AddConversion is called; value_profile's Hamming gradient cannot complete the exact 4-byte tag.
one_line: I2S plants exact device-class FOURCC to reach AddConversion call site

mechanism_summary: VP's CMP_MAP gradient preserves inputs that get closer on the colorspace-compatibility comparisons as new corpus entries, compounding I2S substitution in vpc with a stepwise ratchet toward the compatible-colorspace configuration that bare cmplog's edge-bucket feedback cannot climb.
one_line: VP gradient compounds I2S by retaining near-miss colorspace-compatibility inputs

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace substitutes intercepted FOURCC/colorspace constants (device-class and colorspace tags at header offsets) into the input, constructing the output-direction profile combination that causes conversion failure with a non-NULL Lut; plain value_profile cannot assemble this multi-field header.
one_line: I2S assembles rare output-direction device-class/colorspace header combination

mechanism_summary: VP's Hamming/prefix-distance CMP_MAP buckets preserve inputs approaching the colorspace/device-class comparison matches as corpus, supplying stepping-stones to I2S substitution in vpc; cmplog alone discards near-misses and cannot ratchet toward the rare header combination.
one_line: VP CMP_MAP retains near-miss colorspace header inputs as I2S stepping-stones

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace logs tag-type and device-class signature comparands and splices them into multiple header fields (device-class 'link' at 0x0c, colorspace bytes, flag 0x01 at 0x2d), making _cmsGetTagTrueType return a non-Lut16 type that crosses the OriginalType != cmsSigLut16Type guard.
one_line: I2S plants non-Lut16 tag-type and device-class signatures to cross type equality guard

mechanism_summary: VP's CMP_MAP gradient buckets preserve inputs whose multi-byte signature fields (device class, colorspace, tag type) are progressively closer to a valid non-Lut16 layout, building the corpus scaffold that the I2S stage in vpc then completes; cmplog alone discards these near-miss seeds.
one_line: VP gradient retains near-miss signature seeds that cmplog discards as corpus scaffold

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace substitutes ICC magic/signature operands into the right header offsets, clearing upstream equality gates that gate construction of an offset-bearing matrix stage; VP cannot place those operands and the Offset pointer stays NULL.
one_line: I2S clears header equality gates enabling non-NULL matrix stage Offset construction

mechanism_summary: VP's CMP_MAP records a Hamming/prefix-distance bucket per comparison and retains any input that brings a comparand pair closer to matching; this gradient on the ICC header/signature bytes drives vpc past the multi-field signature gates that cmplog's edge-bucket-only feedback cannot incrementally solve.
one_line: VP Hamming gradient on ICC header CMPs drives past multi-field signature gates

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace substitutes logged CMP operands for the profile-class FOURCC check into the matching input offsets, producing a non-empty pipeline whose stages cmsPipelineCat attempts to dup, reaching the InsertStage true branch; VP without I2S never substitutes the alternate profile-class operands.
one_line: I2S substitutes profile-class FOURCC enabling non-empty pipeline stage-dup insertion path

mechanism_summary: VP's CMP_MAP Hamming/prefix-distance buckets reward inputs that bring the profile-class/colorspace FOURCC comparands closer to matching, retaining partial-match corpus entries that cmplog's edge-only feedback discards, enabling vpc to resolve the multi-field gate reliably.
one_line: VP distance buckets reward partial FOURCC/colorspace progress cmplog discards

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace substitutes logged FOURCC operands ('prtr' device-class, 'Lab ' colorspace) into the matching input signature offsets, steering execution to a cmsPipelineAlloc call where InputChannels reaches cmsMAXCHANNELS and the boundary check fires.
one_line: I2S places 'prtr'/'Lab' FOURCCs to route to cmsMAXCHANNELS boundary check

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP prefix-length bucket feedback is the capability cmplog lacks; value_profile retains intermediate near-matches on FOURCC signature comparisons, providing a gradient that cmplog's CMP buffer alone cannot supply.
one_line: VP CMP_MAP prefix-length bucket gradient is what cmplog lacks for FOURCC convergence

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP gradient on regexp-parser integer comparisons (atom min/max/quant fields) preserves near-matching parser states as corpus, incrementally driving input toward the automaton-construction path that yields a non-null epsilon-transition target.
one_line: VP gradient walks regexp integer comparisons toward non-null automaton transition state

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace reads CmpLogObserver and substitutes logged comparand bytes (DOCTYPE/version XML scaffolding and facet pattern tokens) into the input, satisfying exact-literal parser checks so the automaton reaches the non-null-target epsilon-transition path.
one_line: I2S splices exact XML/DTD literals to reach non-null automaton target path

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP Hamming/prefix-distance feedback rewards partial matches through DTD/validation string comparisons, accumulating a structured input prefix that reaches the optional-quantifier content-model case and passes a non-NULL automaton target to xmlAutomataNewEpsilon.
one_line: VP gradient assembles optional-quantifier DTD content model supplying non-null automaton target

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace splices logged DTD keyword and element literal comparands into the input at matching offsets, assembling the exact DOCTYPE content-model tokens needed to reach the optional-quantifier branch with a non-NULL automaton target.

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP Hamming/prefix-distance gradient preserves inputs progressively closer to matching the multi-byte '<![CDATA[' parser token comparisons, letting the corpus climb toward a valid CDATA construct that dispatches to the target switch case.
one_line: VP gradient climbs multi-byte CDATA token comparisons to reach XML_CDATA_SECTION_NODE switch arm

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace splices the exact '<![CDATA[' literal (logged CDATA/element token comparands) into the input so the parser builds a CDATA section node, reaching the switch-case arm that value_profile stumbles onto only rarely.

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace reads CmpLogObserver and splices XML keyword/token bytes into the input, repairing the prologue enough to drive a second xmlNewNs call, taking the false (non-NULL nsDef) path on the second invocation.
one_line: I2S repairs XML prologue tokens to trigger second namespace definition call

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP distance-bucket feedback retains near-miss inputs whose CMP operands are progressively closer to matching xmlns and prologue token comparisons, accumulating corpus progress toward a two-namespace document where node->nsDef is already populated at the second xmlns declaration.

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace substitutes logged element/attribute and xmlns literal bytes at matching input offsets, so the parser builds an empty element with a declared namespace, making nsNr != ctxt->nsNr true at the empty-element close.

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP gradient preserves seeds whenever a CMP-operand pair is closer to matching markup literals (<?xml, DOCTYPE, attribute delimiters) than any seen before, letting vpc climb multi-character token comparisons toward a namespaced empty element that changes nsNr.
one_line: VP gradient climbs multi-character markup literal comparisons toward namespace-count-changing empty element
